D4 Colorimetry L4 Analyze Reference

Gamuts, Overlaid

stack the sRGB, Adobe RGB, Display P3, and BT.2020 triangles on the horseshoe and see how much of visible colour each can actually reach

A working space can only reproduce colours inside the triangle pinned by its three primaries. Larger triangles reach more saturated colour — but every device gamut is dwarfed by the full horseshoe of visible light.

Pick the space to highlight. Its triangle fills and its primaries are marked; the others stay as thin outlines. The readout gives its chromaticity-triangle area relative to BT.2020, the widest of the four.
